---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one
title: ""
labels: enhancement
---

**Which crate/package/engine does this affect?** (Keystone core, Meridian/geo, Prism/vector,
Chronos/time-series, Plexus/graph, Canopy/document, Flux/streaming, Synapse, Mirror, an SDK, Canvas,
Harbor, the operator, ...)

**What problem does this solve?**
Describe the use case, not just the desired API — helps us evaluate whether it fits the platform's
scope (see the hard constraints in `CONTRIBUTING.md`: no wire-protocol/SQL-parser libraries, no
Row-Level Security).

**Proposed solution**
What you'd like to see, if you have something concrete in mind.

**Alternatives considered**
Any workarounds you're using today, or other approaches you ruled out.
